creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG

==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/py-salt/Makefile	Mon May  6 13:40:45 2013	(r317514)
+++ head/sysutils/py-salt/Makefile	Mon May  6 13:42:46 2013	(r317515)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	salt
-PORTVERSION=	0.14.1
+PORTVERSION=	0.15.0

 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
